This is the Crazy Mansion! A garden of maids, all fulfilling the
Since the young crossdresser's had his cherry popped, the second
round is now available! Please have fun!
"The mansion might be in the shape of an inverted triangle,
but it won't ever fall down!"

but most of them don't go for men...

It's not really gay! Don't you agree!?
Sometimes a cute, slender young man will catch the eye of one of
the older gentlemen. They can get really pushy about it too.
But don't worry! We're very strict about consent around here!
Sex should be enjoyed by everyone involved!
